detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HOUNDFIRE._transfer(address,address,uint256) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#651-775):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#715)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#789-801)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#721)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#809)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#773)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#935)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#915)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#917)
	HOUNDFIRE._rOwned (HOUNDFIRE.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOUNDFIRE._takeTeam(uint256) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#929-937)
	- HOUNDFIRE._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#889-925)
	- HOUNDFIRE.balanceOf(address) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#477-481)
	- HOUNDFIRE.constructor() (HOUNDFIRE.sol#411-441)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#773)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#943)
	HOUNDFIRE._rTotal (HOUNDFIRE.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOUNDFIRE._getCurrentSupply() (HOUNDFIRE.sol#1085-1095)
	- HOUNDFIRE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#941-947)
	- HOUNDFIRE.constructor() (HOUNDFIRE.sol#411-441)
	- HOUNDFIRE.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (HOUNDFIRE.sol#573-595)

		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](HOUNDFIRE.sol#L915)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](HOUNDFIRE.sol#L917)

	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](HOUNDFIRE.sol#L773)

	[HOUNDFIRE._rTotal](HOUNDFIRE.sol#L335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:

	- [HOUNDFIRE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](HOUNDFIRE.sol#L941-L947)

	- [HOUNDFIRE.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](HOUNDFIRE.sol#L573-L595)
